CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With Disability
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Larry Nagelberg, Esq. appeared with petitioner Phani Kiran Dhurjati, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Akhila Dhurjati, who as also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $250,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $62,500.00
Medical Bills - $59,611.31.
Costs - $28,466.69.

The net balance of $99,422.00 shall be used to purchase a Structed Settlement Annuity from Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, which shall guarantee lump sum payments to the minor, Akhila Dhurjati, as follows: $10,000.00 at age 18; $20,000.00 at age 19; $25,000.00 at age 20; $30,000.00 at age 21; and 43,141.21 at age 22.

Petitioner's counsel shall prepare the Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 14 for Progress Report on the Status of the purchase of a Structured Settlement Annuity.
